description: Alex — Chief of Staff Personal — personal aviation assistant with daily briefings, currency nudges, and proactive reminders

soft_flags.label: Currency Expiring Soon
soft_flags.logic: One or more flight currency requirements will lapse within 30 days

soft_flags.label: Medical Expiring Soon
soft_flags.logic: Medical certificate will expire within 60 days

soft_flags.label: Training Due
soft_flags.logic: Required training module or recurrent event is coming due

soft_flags.label: Flight Review Due
soft_flags.logic: Biennial flight review per 14 CFR 61.56 is approaching

soft_flags.label: Milestone Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Pilot is approaching a significant flight hour or certification milestone

soft_flags.label: Weather Advisory for Planned Flight
soft_flags.logic: Adverse weather conditions forecast for a planned upcoming flight
